tools.name: definitions.deleteAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdArchive
tools.description: Archives a single custom workflow action with the specified ID. Workflows that currently use this custom action will stop attempting to execute the action, and all future executions will be marked as a failure.

tools.name: definitions.getAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdGetById
tools.description: Returns a single custom workflow action with the specified ID.

tools.name: definitions.getAutomationV4ActionsAppIdGetPage
tools.description: Returns a list of all custom workflow actions.

tools.name: definitions.patchAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdUpdate
tools.description: Updates a custom workflow action with new values for the specified fields.

tools.name: definitions.postAutomationV4ActionsAppIdCreate
tools.description: Creates a new custom workflow action.

tools.name: functions.deleteAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdFunctionsFunctionTypeArchiveByFunctionType
tools.description: Delete a function for a custom workflow action. This will remove the function itself as well as removing the association between the function and the custom action. This can't be undone.

tools.name: functions.deleteAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdFunctionsFunctionTypeFunctionIdArchive
tools.description: Delete a function for a custom workflow action. This will remove the function itself as well as removing the association between the function and the custom action. This can't be undone.

tools.name: functions.getAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdFunctionsFunctionTypeFunctionIdGetById
tools.description: Returns the given function for a custom workflow action.

tools.name: functions.getAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdFunctionsFunctionTypeGetByFunctionType
tools.description: Returns the given function for a custom workflow action.

tools.name: functions.getAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdFunctionsGetPage
tools.description: Returns a list of all functions that are associated with the given custom workflow action.

tools.name: functions.putAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdFunctionsFunctionTypeCreateOrReplaceByFunctionType
tools.description: Creates or replaces a function for a custom workflow action.

tools.name: functions.putAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdFunctionsFunctionTypeFunctionIdCreateOrReplace
tools.description: Creates or replaces a function for a custom workflow action.

tools.name: revisions.getAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdRevisionsGetPage
tools.description: Returns a list of revisions for a custom workflow action.

tools.name: revisions.getAutomationV4ActionsAppIdDefinitionIdRevisionsRevisionIdGetById
tools.description: Returns the given version of a custom workflow action.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
